content: By integrating a 2025-configurable ICM curiosity mechanism into open-domain chatbots can transform static response generation: instead of only optimizing for human preference alignment alone, chatbots gain intrinsic reward for exploring conversational tangents that feel novel to the model itself, leading to more unscripted, engaging dialogues rather than generic, safe responses. This works especially well for open-ended use cases like companion chatbots or creative writing assistants, where predictable pattern exhaustion is a common user complaint.
